MARCInd1Label: Type of meeting name entry element
Justification for Mapping: We know that a series heading in a 440 or 800-830 field must be for a Work to Work relationship, but we (again) cannot tell whether is for an aggregating work or a multi-part work.
Transformation Notes:
<WorkIRI> is issue of <$1|>
<$1> nomen property <nomenIRI>
<nomenIRI> rdand:P80068 " "value of a, c, d, e, f, g, k, l, n, p, q, s, t, u" .// has nomen string
<nomenIRI> rdan:P80069 <scheme> .// has scheme of nomen

If $2 is approved source, use rdawo:P10331 .// has authorized access point for work. If unapproved use rdawo:P10328 .// has access point for work
- CP 2024-12-06
Problems with Mapping: even if we think the heading is actually for a multi-part work and so should be transformed as a <WorkIRI> has part work <WorkIRI> instead

MARCInd1Label: Type of meeting name entry element
MARCSubfield: a, c, e, q, u, d, g, n
RDA Registry Label: has related corporate body of work
Transformation Notes:
<Series Work IRI> has related corporate body of work <CorporateBodyIRI>
<CorporateBodyIRI> nomen property <NomenIRI>
<NomenIRI> has nomen string "value of $a$c$e$q$u + $d$g$n"
<NomenIRI> has scheme of nomen <$2>

If $2 is approved source, use rdaao:P50407 .// has authorized access point for corporate body. If unapproved use rdawo:P50375 .// has access point for corporate body
